title: Chapter 283
content:
The atmosphere seemed straight out of a luxurious dream. Upon entering Scarlet's personal bathroom, Strax was momentarily speechless. The space was immense, almost as big as a ballroom, and every detail exuded elegance and power.

Walls of black marble with golden veins stretched from floor to ceiling, softly reflecting the light of red crystal chandeliers, which hung high above, emitting a warm and cozy glow. Decorative columns carved with dragons and roses supported the structure, adding an imposing touch to the ambience.

Gigantic mirrors covered almost every wall, making the space seem even larger than it already was. They were adorned with intricate gold frames, and their surface was so clear that it reflected even the smallest detail, capturing the room with impressive clarity.

In the center of the room, there was a monumental bathtub, which looked more like a luxurious swimming pool. The oval shape was surrounded by polished marble edges, inlaid with small precious stones that sparkled in the light. The water in the tub was already full, and a delicate steam rose from it, bringing with it a soft, intoxicating scent of lavender and jasmine.

Around the tub, artificial waterfalls flowed down the sides, pouring water continuously, while small underwater lighting systems made the water glow in shades of red and gold.

At the opposite end, a set of ceiling showers, designed like a tropical rain shower, occupied another area of the bathroom. The showers were surrounded by frosted glass walls, decorated with engravings of dragons in battle.

Next to it was a rest area with padded armchairs, small tables with perfectly folded towels and dark wooden shelves containing glass bottles of oils, bath salts and exotic essences. Scented candles were scattered around, and some were already lit, casting dancing shadows across the walls.

Finally, there was a small raised area that looked like a private dressing room, with hangers and a luxurious wooden cupboard where Scarlet probably kept her outfits.

Strax looked around, impressed, before turning to Scarlet, who had entered just behind him. She took off her combat jacket with a fluid, casual movement, throwing it over one of the nearby armchairs.

"Welcome to my refuge." Scarlet said, with a slight smile on her face, as she nonchalantly moved towards the bathtub. Then she began to remove her clothes, not at all ashamed of her body.

First, she took off her uniform, revealing black lingerie that hugged her seductive curves. The dim light of the shower room accentuated the voluptuous shapes of her body, leaving Strax mesmerized by her exotic beauty.

Slowly, she lowered her panties, showing her perfect round ass, exposed to Strax. Her naked body was a masterpiece of femininity and sensuality, with generous curves in all the right places. Her full, firm breasts had pink nipples that looked inviting. Her narrow waist and rounded hips gave her an hourglass-shaped body, which was enhanced by her long, toned legs.

Scarlet stepped into the tub with fluid elegance, sliding into the water with a satisfied sigh. She leaned back against the edge, letting the warm water relax her muscles as she looked at Strax with a mysterious smile. Her naked body was only partially submerged in the water, allowing him to appreciate every curve and soft skin.

"Like what you see?" she teased, her mischievous smile spreading across her face. Her pink nipples were hardening under the water, her full breasts floating invitingly on the surface.

[One chance]

"Come and join me..." Scarlet spoke suddenly, her red lips curving into an inviting smile. "Didn't you want that? Come on."

While Strax hesitated for a moment, feeling the heat spread through his body, Scarlet stared at him expectantly. She could feel the desire growing inside her at the sight of the muscular body of the man who would become her son-in-law. Her eyes scanned him lustfully, devouring every bit of him.

With one fluid movement, Strax began to undress, slowly revealing his toned, pale body. His defined abdomen and strong arms were a real spectacle, and Scarlet couldn't help but get lost in the sight of him. She felt a growing warmth between her legs as she watched him approach the bathtub.

'What a strange feeling...' She said... despite having daughters... this woman... hasn't even had a moment alone with a man in the last three thousand years. Her daughters were adopted.

Strax then removed his underwear. His erect member sprang out, fully erect and throbbing. Scarlet's eyes widened in surprise at the size and beauty of Strax's cock. She couldn't help but get lost in the sight, feeling the heat rise between her legs.

He walked towards her, unashamed of his erection, and stopped next to her, his cock almost in her face, letting her smell it as he watched... but he didn't do anything, he just got into the bath and went to sit next to her, without saying anything.

'Let's start my plan. Strax thought with a mischievous smile on his face, as he closed his eyes and enjoyed the hot water of the tub.

As they sat together in the tub, the silence was palpable.

Scarlet could feel the sexual tension growing between them, and she didn't know how to handle it.

The three-thousand-year-old vampire was simply beginning to be defeated... She took a deep breath, trying to calm down, and then looked at Strax with a hesitant smile. "So, why did you want to take a bath with me?"

Strax was surprised by the question, but then smiled back. "Huh? I want you for myself," he said with a soft laugh. "I don't think that's hard to understand, I've already taken your three daughters for myself, all that's left is you."

Scarlet laughed, shaking her head. "You're too bold, it amazes me how you're still alive all this time."

"I'm Me," Strax said, shrugging. "And I was lucky."

They were silent for a moment, listening to the sound of the water bubbling in the bathtub. Then Scarlet turned to Strax with a serious expression. "I think I overreacted," she said. "I know it can't have been easy for you, but... Well, I didn't expect you to go so far as to become a Vampire."

"No," Strax said, shaking his head. "I did what I had to do, I got stronger, that's what matters."

"Even so, I'm apologizing. I can be irrational at times, but I have my moments of rationality," Scarlet insisted. "You're a good man, Strax. And I know you'll make a great husband for my daughter."

"Well, I can be for you too," he said smiling, teasing her.

Scarlet was surprised by Strax's bold provocation, but she couldn't help smiling. She knew he was a bold and confident man, and that appealed to her in a way she couldn't explain.

"You're very bold, Strax," she said, shaking her head with a laugh. "But I like that about you. You're not afraid of anything, are you?"

"I'm not afraid of anything worth doing," he said with a mischievous smile. "And I don't think washing your body is a fear."

Scarlet laughed again, feeling more relaxed now. "Well, I guess I wouldn't object to a little help cleaning myself up," she said, winking at him. "But you have to promise not to get too funny."

"Don't worry, I'll be a perfect gentleman," Strax said, with an innocent smile on his face. But as soon as Scarlet turned her back on him, her smile turned into a mischievous grin. He knew there was no resisting this sexy, sassy woman.

She turned to him, looking into his red eyes. "I think you're enjoying this a little too much," she murmured, with a teasing smile. "Maybe you need a lesson in how to be a perfect gentleman."

Strax laughed, stepping even closer to her. "I'm a grown man, Scarlet. I know how to behave," he said, his voice husky. "But I can't deny that you attract me in a way I can't explain."

Scarlet felt a shiver run through her body at his words. She knew she shouldn't give in to this desire, but she couldn't resist it.

"Then show me how much you want me," she whispered, pulling him into a passionate kiss. "Show me that you're the right man for me."
